description: Create a mechanical drawing of a pear-shaped cam with a keyed shaft bore in LibreCAD using millimeter units. The drawing must include a 'PROFILE' layer (Color: White/7) containing the outer cam shape formed by a base circle (Radius 30mm at 0,0) and a nose circle (Radius 10mm at 0,50) joined by tangent lines. Include a 'BORE' layer (Color: Cyan/4) featuring a 20mm diameter shaft hole centered at (0,0) with a 5mm wide keyway notch (centered on the Y-axis) with its top edge at Y=13mm. Ensure both the cam profile and the keyed bore are single continuous shapes. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/cam_profile.dxf.
